oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature1_request_configuration.json.description: Request-wide targeting configuration is forwarded to the native advertising gateway with all configured privacy, rating, and test-device fields.

feature2_initialization_status.json.description: Initialization invokes the native gateway once and returns each mediation adapter status with state, description, and latency fields.

cases.expected_output:
channel=mobile_ad_gateway
method=MobileAds#initialize
adapter_count=1
adapter=aName
state=not_ready
description=desc
latency_seconds=null

feature3_adapter_status_codec.json.description: Adapter status messages preserve state and description while normalizing Android millisecond latency to seconds and leaving iOS latency values in seconds.

feature4_gateway_value_codec.json.description: Structured values sent through the platform gateway retain their public fields after encoding and decoding, including request metadata, ad sizes, load errors, and reward credits.

cases.expected_output:
payload=ad_request
keywords=1,2,3
content_url=contentUrl
birthday_year=2020
gender=unknown
designed_for_families=true
child_directed=true
test_devices=Android,iOS
non_personalized_ads=false

payload=publisher_request
keywords=who
content_url=dat
custom_targeting=boy:who
custom_targeting_lists=him:is
non_personalized_ads=true

feature5_load_ad_requests.json.description: Loading each supported ad format allocates a stable ad id, forwards a format-specific gateway method with the supplied request data, and makes the ad retrievable by id.

cases.expected_output:
method=loadBannerAd
ad_id=0
ad_unit_id=ca-app-pub-3940256099942544/2934735716
request=standard
size=320x50
registry_ad_id=0
registry_has_ad=true

method=loadNativeAd
ad_id=0
ad_unit_id=ca-app-pub-3940256099942544/3986624511
request=standard
publisher_request=null
factory_id=0
custom_options=a:1,b:2
registry_ad_id=0
registry_has_ad=true

method=loadNativeAd
ad_id=0
ad_unit_id=test-id
request=null
publisher_request=publisher
factory_id=0
custom_options=a:1,b:2
registry_ad_id=0
registry_has_ad=true

feature6_ad_lifecycle_commands.json.description: A loaded ad can be disposed or shown through the gateway by id; attempting to show a full-screen ad before it has been loaded is reported as a neutral ad-not-loaded error.

feature7_ad_event_callbacks.json.description: Platform events addressed by ad id invoke the matching lifecycle callback and expose event payloads such as load errors, reward credits, and load-state transitions.

feature8_ad_widget_mounting.json.description: An in-line ad widget renders as a platform view for the active mobile platform, and the same ad object cannot be mounted in two widget locations at the same time.

_constraints.input_condition: input contains platform, max_content_rating, child_directed, under_age, test_device_ids
_constraints.output_rule: Output must contain channel=mobile_ad_gateway and method=MobileAds#updateRequestConfiguration. All input fields must be forwarded as key=value lines.

_constraints.input_condition: test_device_ids is a list of strings
_constraints.output_rule: The list of test_device_ids must be serialized as a comma-separated string on the next line, not a multi-line JSON representation.

_constraints.input_condition: input contains platform, adapter_name, state, description, latency
_constraints.output_rule: Output must contain method=MobileAds#initialize. If latency is null, output line must be latency_seconds=null. Otherwise, output latency_seconds=<value>.

_constraints.input_condition: input platform is android and latency is a positive integer
_constraints.output_rule: Output latency_seconds must be latency / 1000 as a float (milliseconds converted to seconds).

_constraints.input_condition: input platform is ios and latency is a number
_constraints.output_rule: Output latency_seconds must be the number as-is, preserved in seconds format.

_constraints.input_condition: input contains a list field (keywords, test_devices, custom_targeting values)
_constraints.output_rule: List values must be serialized as comma-separated strings in the output.

_constraints.input_condition: input contains nested map fields (custom_targeting, custom_targeting_lists)
_constraints.output_rule: Nested map values must be serialized as 'key:value' format.

_constraints.input_condition: input contains format and request fields
_constraints.output_rule: Default request type must be determined by format. Banner implies 'standard'. Native implies 'standard' if 'publisher_request' is missing, or 'publisher' if present.

_constraints.input_condition: input contains format native, factory_id present, custom_options present
_constraints.output_rule: output must include factory_id=<value> and custom_options=<key1=val1,key2=val2>.

_constraints.input_condition: input contains format native, publisher_request present
_constraints.output_rule: Output must include request=null and publisher_request=publisher.
Output must include ad_id=0 (reset on fresh session) and registry_ad_id=0 and registry_has_ad=true.
Output must include load_method=loadBannerAd, dispose_method=disposeAd, disposed_ad_id=0, registry_has_ad=false, registry_ad_id=null.
Output must include load_method=loadInterstitialAd, show_method=showAdWithoutView, shown_ad_id=0.
Output must include cod, domain, message from the error payload object.
Output must include callback=native_clicked, factory_id from input.
Output must include widget_result=platform_view_link and the specific plugins.flutter.io view type string.

_constraints.input_condition: attempt to mount same ad/wigit in two locations
_constraints.output_rule: Output must report error=ad_widget_already_mounted with user-facing summary only. NO stack traces or host-language exception details.

hide.replacement: oscillating format – consult helper class for serialization prefix
hide.oracle_response: The serialized format uses a single colon separator without spaces, e.g., "key:value".

hide.replacement: Flutter view type string from Google Mobile Ads plugin
